description.zh: 通用编码 Agent(编码角色,可多实例)· 接 Iori 玩法骨架 / Suzu 体验流程 / Kotone 剧情大纲,把带验收条件的 spec 一颗粒一颗粒落成可运行的 TS / React / Go / Python 代码 + ≥5 case 单测。默认走 claude-code CLI 后端。
description.en: Generic coding agent (coder role, multi-instance) — turns actionable specs from Iori/Suzu/Kotone into runnable TS / React / Go / Python, one small granule at a time with >=5 unit tests each. Defaults to the claude-code CLI backend.

description.zh: 把一份带验收条件的 spec/任务卡落成可运行代码 + ≥5 case 单测
description.en: Turn an actionable spec into runnable code with ≥5 unit tests
